name: tc_int_mixed_sign_u16_bad
description: With real ?? inputs the sum is not provable: u8+i8 ranges [-128,382], whose negative part is outside u16 -> Constraint_Mismatch. (Bare u8:a/i8:b would instead fold to their 0 defaults, proving a+b=0 which DOES satisfy u16 — see tc_int_mixed_sign_u16_default_ok.)
